footer.brandDesc: Tailored artificial intelligence that adapts and evolves with small and mid-sized businesses. Document automation, financial analysis, knowledge and dedicated solutions.

chat.title: Finch-AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Usually replies in a few seconds
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Finch-AI's assistant. I can answer questions about solutions, blog articles and features, or help you describe your need and connect you with the team. Where would you like to start?
suggested: I have a need, can you help?
chat.gdpr: Your questions are sent to OpenAI to generate the answer. Please don't include personal or confidential data.
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

lead.title: Request an assessment
lead.intro: Leave your contact details and a short description: the Finch-AI team will review your need and get back to you to schedule a meeting.
lead.attached: We automatically attach this conversation to give us context.
lead.problemPlaceholder: E.g. I'd like to automate accounts-payable invoice entry...

lead.success: Request sent! The Finch-AI team will get back to you to schedule the meeting.
